ddls:
CREATE TABLE "coverage_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coverage metric entry */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the group (e.g., hr-ms) */,
  "package_name" TEXT /* Name of the package (e.g., com.talenteo.hr.service) */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Name of the class (e.g., CompanyService) */,
  "instruction_missed" INTEGER /* Number of instructions missed in the class */,
  "instruction_covered" INTEGER /* Number of instructions covered in the class */,
  "branch_missed" INTEGER /* Number of branches missed in the class */,
  "branch_covered" INTEGER /* Number of branches covered in the class */,
  "line_missed" INTEGER /* Number of lines missed in the class */,
  "line_covered" INTEGER /* Number of lines covered in the class */,
  "complexity_missed" INTEGER /* Number of complexity points missed in the class */,
  "complexity_covered" INTEGER /* Number of complexity points covered in the class */,
  "method_missed" INTEGER /* Number of methods missed in the class */,
  "method_covered" INTEGER /* Number of methods covered in the class */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the version of the coverage data */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric was recorded */,
  "test_suite_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the test suite */,
  "test_case_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the test case */,
  "coverage_percentage" TEXT /* Overall coverage percentage for the class */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Last modification date of the metric */,
  "is_deleted" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the metric has been logically deleted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coverage_metrics_group_name FOREIGN KEY ("group_name") REFERENCES groups ("group_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coverage_metrics_package_name FOREIGN KEY ("package_name") REFERENCES packages ("package_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coverage_metrics_class_name FOREIGN KEY ("class_name") REFERENCES classes ("class_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coverage_metrics_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES coverage_versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "groups" (
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each group */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the group (e.g., hr-ms) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the group */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the group was created */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Last modification date of the group */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the group is active */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the owner user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_groups_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("owner_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "packages" (
  "package_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each package */,
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the group the package belongs to */,
  "package_name" TEXT /* Name of the package (e.g., com.talenteo.hr.service) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the package */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the package was created */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Last modification date of the package */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the package is active */,
  "maintainer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the maintainer user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("package_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_packages_maintainer_id FOREIGN KEY ("maintainer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "classes" (
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each class */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the package the class belongs to */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Name of the class (e.g., CompanyService) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the class */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the class was created */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Last modification date of the class */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the class is active */,
  "maintainer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the maintainer user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_classes_maintainer_id FOREIGN KEY ("maintainer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coverage_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the coverage data */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "created_by_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the version */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the version is active */,
  "last_modified_by_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who last modified the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coverage_versions_last_modified_by_id FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coverage_versions_created_by_id FOREIGN KEY ("created_by_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, test engineer, quality assurance manager) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Last modification date of the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the user is active */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the coverage metric being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the coverage data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the coverage data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the metric */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the access request */,
  "is_valid" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the access was valid */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES coverage_metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
